name: alibi
description: Git-archaeology detective that recovers WHY code exists — not just who last touched it. Skips the formatting commits blame keeps framing people with, digs to the true origin commit, chases PRs/issues/review threads, and rules on the code's alibi: JUSTIFIED / EXPIRED / COLD CASE. Six investigation modes: why-not-who, commit-to-story, first-broken (bisect), incident-trace, design-rationale, repo-tour.
